description: Purple List — fixed semi/AI fragility basket (Kobi's index leaders — composition locked by decision 2026-07-20). `yahooSymbol` overrides the fetch symbol; `predecessorYahoo` splices the predecessor ticker's scale-adjusted OHLC before the main symbol's first trading day (SNDK: Western Digital held the SanDisk flash business until the Feb-2025 spinoff).

changeLog.change: v2: SNDK gains predecessorYahoo=WDC (pre-spinoff history splice) — fixes the basket-wide history truncation to Feb-2025. IFX switched from the IFNNY OTC ADR to the native IFX.DE (Xetra) listing — Kobi's source ticker list uses XETR:IFX, and IFX.DE carries ~7x IFNNY's daily volume (verified against Yahoo, 2026-07-20), reducing wick/dist/disp noise from thin-ADR trading. Composition unchanged.
v1: initial basket from the Purple_List_250d study.
